name: Britain's Secret Islands
overview: Join Stewart McPherson on a journey around the UK on the spectacular ship Pelican of London, to discover the wildlife and secrets of the most remote British Isles shimmering in the sea mists.  Explore the wildlife of these regions, meet the people that live there, and see the history and culture of these areas.

trailers.title: Catch 'Britains Secret Islands' on FRIDAYS at 20H15 on the #TheHISTORYChannel, DStv 186.
